events.title: NYC Summer Streets
events.description: Five Saturdays of car-free streets across Manhattan with free activities and space to walk, bike and explore.

events.title: Manhattanhenge Block Party
events.description: Free block party at AMNH with salsa music and a World Cup watch party timed to the last Manhattanhenge sunset of the season.

events.title: Uptown Shakespeare in the Park: Othello
events.venue: Richard Rodgers Amphitheater, Marcus Garvey Park
events.description: A free live outdoor staging of Shakespeare's tragedy of love, jealousy, power, and betrayal in Harlem.

events.title: The 15th Annual New York City Poetry Festival
events.description: An annual outdoor poetry festival on Governors Island featuring readings from a wide range of poets.

events.title: NY Comedy Festival 2026
events.description: A newly announced comedy festival lineup features Ziwe, Matt Rogers, Sarah Sherman, Marc Maron and other stand-up favorites.

events.title: ADAA Tribeca Gallery Walk
events.description: A free after-hours walk exploring exhibitions at 20 ADAA member galleries in Tribeca.

events.title: World Cup 2026 NYC Fan Events
events.description: Free FIFA World Cup fan experiences across all five boroughs, including a group stage HQ, fan villages, and fan zones.

events.title: NYNJ World Cup 26 x Telemundo Fan Village
events.description: The flagship Manhattan World Cup fan experience with live match viewing, a Champions' Garden, and fan zones.

events.title: FIFA Museum: Legacies of Champions
events.description: A free immersive exhibition showcasing original objects and showcases from every World Cup tournament since 1930.

events.title: Adidas Home of Soccer
events.description: A 25,000-square-foot World Cup activation with watch parties, retail, dining, and a soccer pitch featuring live performances.

events.title: House of GOAL
events.time: 1:00 PM - 9:00 PM weekdays, 1:00 PM - 3:00 AM weekends
events.description: A celebration of sport, style, sound, and street life built around seven themed pillars including music, tech, and film.

events.title: Concacaf House
events.description: An installation featuring 41 hand-painted cleats celebrating Concacaf member nations alongside interactive fan zones.

events.title: Lincoln Center World Cup Watch Parties
events.description: Outdoor big-screen viewings of select FIFA World Cup matches on Lincoln Center's Hearst Plaza.

events.title: Kalshi Football Club
events.description: World Cup match viewings paired with live performances, food, drinks, mini tournaments, and a vintage apparel market.

events.title: World Cup 26 Jersey Fan Hub
events.description: New Jersey's official World Cup fan experience with live match broadcasts and interactive activations.

events.title: Work from Bar with Stella Artois
events.description: Stella Artois invites remote workers to trade their desks for a local bar during World Cup match hours, with reimbursement offered.

events.title: Match Day Live at Brookfield Place
events.description: A free, open-to-the-public fan destination with match streaming, a mini soccer pitch, and a beer garden.

events.title: Michelob Ultra Pitchside Club
events.description: A World Cup viewing experience featuring a bouncer challenge, a Messi virtual game, and trophy photo ops.

events.title: Queens Classic: Semifinal Watch Party
events.description: A public screening of the FIFA World Cup semifinal match with giveaways and Footy Fest celebrations.

events.title: 2026 Citi Concert Series on TODAY
events.description: Free weekly summer concert series on the TODAY show plaza featuring artists like Zara Larsson, Bleachers, Charlie Puth, and Lizzo.

events.title: Carnegie Hall Citywide
events.description: Free concerts celebrating musical traditions from across the country and around the globe, held at venues throughout the city.

events.title: Manifesting Marilyn: The Making of an Icon
events.description: An immersive exhibition marking Marilyn Monroe's centennial that explores a lesser-known side of her story.

events.title: "Marilyn Monroe: Beyond the Myth"
events.description: An exhibition exploring Marilyn Monroe as the architect of her own public image.

events.title: New Wing Opening at the New York Historical
events.description: The New York Historical's newest wing, a hub for democracy education, is now open to the public.

events.title: Christopher Myers Art Installation
events.description: A free installation by artist Christopher Myers turns books into stained glass and towering tapestries at the Brooklyn Public Library.

events.title: "Chasing the Sun" by Yinka Ilori
events.description: A vibrant public installation from Milan Design Week by artist Yinka Ilori is on view outside the Standard East Village.

events.title: Downtown Brooklyn Public Art Gallery
events.description: A colorful series of street murals has transformed 21 spaces across Downtown Brooklyn's pedestrian streets into an open-air gallery.

events.title: Ping-Pong on Giant Art Installations
events.description: Six playable, artist-designed ping-pong tables have turned a Rockaway Beach block into an outdoor game room.

events.title: KCCNY K Culture Event
events.description: A summer-long Korean culture festival with K-Beauty, gaming, food, and immersive entertainment installations.

events.description: A Seoul-inspired pop-up in Brooklyn offering beauty lounges, cultural workshops, and a K-café.

events.title: Hershey Felder: The Piano and Me

events.title: Sukkot
